text: ROOT TMVA SOFIE minimal ONNX workflow: create a parser/model object from an ONNX file, validate supported operators, and call Generate() to emit C++ inference sources. The generated model artifacts are compiled into analysis code rather than interpreted dynamically.

SOFIE code generation typically emits a model header and weight artifacts. A conservative baseline expectation is that ONNX parsing and C++ emission are documented together and can be used as a reproducible pipeline for offline inference in ROOT-based workflows.

SOFIE Session-based inference loads generated model artifacts and executes inference with strongly typed inputs/outputs. The workflow assumes generated headers are available at compile time and linked into the runtime binary.

Runtime dependencies for SOFIE are build-profile dependent: ROOT with TMVA SOFIE enabled is required, ONNX parsing support may require extra build flags, and generated model code must be compiled with the target application for deployment.
